title: Wood
description: Wood sanding issues including scratches, raised grain, stain prep, veneer, softwood, hardwood, and edges.

title: Paint / Primer
description: Paint and primer sanding issues including clogging, feather edges, scratches, chips, dull spots, and repaint prep.

title: Clear Coat
description: Clear coat wet sanding issues including haze, orange peel, 1500 marks, edge burn-through, and polish prep.

title: Metal
description: Metal sanding issues including rust pits, oxidation, directional scratches, aluminum loading, burrs, and paint prep.

title: Plastic
description: Plastic sanding issues including white haze, smearing, fuzzy edges, visible scratches, heat, and clogged paper.

title: Drywall Patch
description: Drywall patch sanding issues including ridges, torn paper, clogged joint compound, visible edges, dust, and low spots.

title: General Sheet Problems
description: Sheet and abrasive handling issues including grit shedding, curling, fraying, tearing, residue, soaking, clogging, and worn sheets.
